chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 529 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 11-01-2022 Mr. Ali Mohsin, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General ******* Through this Petition, the Petitioner has sought the following prayer: (a) That this Honourable Court may be pleased to direct the respondents to release the salary of petitioner from April 2013 till today immediately and act according to law”. (b) To award the cost of the petition. (c) Any other relief which this Honourable Court deems fit and proper in the circumstances of the case” On 15.03.2018, this Court had raised an objection as to the maintainability of this Petition on the ground of laches, as apparently the Petitioner had come before this Court after more than five years for the release of salaries. Today, we have confronted the Petitioner’s Counsel, who submits that the Department was approached; however, on perusal of this Petition, it appears that nothing has been disclosed as to overcome the objection regarding laches. In view of such position, apparently this Petition is not maintainable; whereas even otherwise, as per comments, it reflects that the appointment of the Petitioner was fraudulent and stands revoked as well. Admittedly, such cancellation / annulment of the appointment has never been challenged in this Petition. In view of such position, this Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed. JUDGE Ahmad JUDGE
